---
title: CTF python 0 1转化为二维码
abbrlink: 42146
date: 2020-12-23 16:56:36
tags:
---

```python
from PIL import Image
from zlib import *

MAX = 36
pic = Image.new("RGB",(MAX,MAX))
str =""

i=0
for y in range(0,MAX):
    for x in range(0,MAX):
        if(str[i] == '1'):
            pic.putpixel([x,y],(0,0,0))
        else:pic.putpixel([x,y],(255,255,255))
        i = i+1
pic.show()
pic.save("flag.png")

```
